name: Pumpkin Ravioli Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cans (13 3/4 oz.) fat free chicken broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a nonstick skillet with vegetable cooking spray.
2. Saute onion and garlic over medium-low heat until the onion is softened but not brown.
3. Stir in herbs.
4. Add chicken broth and pumpkin; stir to combine.
5. Bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat and simmer 10 minutes.
7. Cook ravioli according to package directions, 3-5 minutes. Drain and divide among 6 soup bowls.
8. Ladle hot soup over ravioli.
9. Sprinkle with cinnamon and garnish with thyme sprigs.
10. Makes 6 servings.
